description: The NOC Manager requires automated initial triage for device down alerts. Create an IT Automation Workflow named exactly 'L1-Automated-Triage'. Use the drag-and-drop workflow builder to add two diagnostic actions to this workflow: 'Ping' (or Ping Device) and 'Trace Route' (or Traceroute). Save the workflow. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123). Note: You do not need to associate it with an alarm trigger; just build and save the reusable workflow template.
